bids.reasoning: The opponent opened with their best offer (all valueD), which gives me minimum utility (0.2 across all issues = 0.2 total). I'll start firm at my maximum utility position.

The opponent is stubbornly repeating their all-valueD offer (utility ~0.2 for me), which is very low. We're only at t=0.02, so there's no time pressure yet. I should stay near my optimal bid but perhaps make a tiny concession to signal willingness to negotiate. I'll keep issueA at valueA (highest weight) and issueB at valueA, but concede slightly on issueC and issueD (lower weight issues) to show some flexibility.
